name: Ash Chapel Hidden Catacombs
intro: The stair gives onto cold that has not moved in years. The dark ahead is full of small pale shapes, and they are all the same shape. The warden kept his dead in order. The cut stair behind you is the way back up. Use it (E) when you have seen enough.

interact.log: The cut stair climbs back toward the cellar.
A tin ledger nailed to the stair-head, the warden's hand counting his dead.
A note pinned over the first gallery, where the fevered were laid.
A note carved over a row of niches, each scratched with the question that earned it.
A work-tally nailed to a post above the chained dead.
A note above the largest row, in a tighter and angrier hand.
A page torn from the ledger and left on the bones, the counting given up.
A confession folded into the hands of a skeleton crowned with carved thorn.
A berth in the fever wall, its slab dragged aside.
A larger berth, the slab carved with a tally of work done.
A berth with the name chiselled off the slab.
A reliquary stuffed with sorted finger-bones instead of relics.
